ab: ulra i ruma’ i imu na vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ulra, ulra alrupe’ kanatu kiya’ezengan.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: ulra i ruma’ i imu na vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: iniyan, maw ziya upatratraran, waruma’ nu ’aremeng lra.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: ulra i ruma’ i imu na ma’inay?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: ulra kazi itras kana kazazuwa rawangan uwa witras aya’u intaw.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: ulra trau i ruma’?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: maw i Masaw, sawariyan ta lra ’azi mena’u kaninu, ’inava u ziya?
ch: B:是Masaw阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Masaw. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: ’inava ku, zuwa ku maya’a kaninu kimazayazayara.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: ulra i iyan i temama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: ulra i sawka temusaasiyaw, kayku vavinayaw.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: mukuwa i iyan i Sunay?
en: Where did Sunay go?

ab: mukuwa intaw i puvuyuyan ’emevanga za vuyu.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: imu, zuwa mi lra a!
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: ninmu temu uniyan i ruma’, ulra i ’uma i intaw, kazu i ruma’ ngangarayu za muruma’ i intaw.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: ama zuwa u lra!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: sawariyan ta lra ’azi marepana’u, atras u lra.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: mena’u ku zanu izazuwa salaw ku semangal.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: ini na pangudangudalr mu vaveray kaninmu, puwayani kana palralritekan
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: sawriyan u lra ’azi zuwa, ku vavinayaw papiya zi salrangalrangana ta mekan.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: kaeman kemazu mavangavang, ’emau ku ziya kana alasepa mu aruwa. kayta i kalisuwasuwan mazayazayara.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: lrayuwan zanu sinadaluwan, averuk ku lra.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: inia na vuyu maw ziya kiyatruwak, adayu muruma’ tawatawaru lra mekan.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
